section_miscategorizations.text: and she has a past medical history of diabetes and high blood pressure
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history belongs with the broader clinical history in HPI rather than in the chief complaint, which should focus on the primary reason for visit.

section_miscategorizations.text: She has an ophthalmology appointment scheduled in two weeks.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A scheduled specialty appointment functions as part of the management plan/follow-up rather than the symptom/history narrative.
